result:
30/30 tests passing. Here's what was added to `Main.scala`:

- **`cmdStatus`** — prints `Staged files:` header with each staged file, or `(none)`
- **`cmdDiff`** — parses both commit file lists, compares by blob hash, prints `Added/Removed/Modified`
- **`cmdCheckout`** — reads blob content for each file in the commit, writes to working dir, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`cmdReset`** — updates HEAD and clears index only (no working dir changes)
- **`cmdRm`** — removes a filename from the index, exits 1 with `File not in index` if missing
- **`cmdShow`** — prints commit metadata plus `Files:` section with two-space indented `filename blobhash` lines
- **`parseCommitFiles`** helper — shared parser for the `files:` section of commit files
